description: What Is Kubernetes - Why Container Orchestration Matters
summary: What Is Kubernetes - Why Container Orchestration Matters
target_audience: Absolute beginners to Kubernetes who have a basic familiarity with containers and Docker

lectures.title: What Is Kubernetes - Why Container Orchestration Matters
objectives: Understand the limitations of running services with containers alone (scaling, failure recovery, deployment)
Explain the problem Kubernetes solves and the core value it provides
Grasp the concept of orchestration intuitively through everyday analogies
